zh.lifeSummary: 當Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad於1538年出生在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德斯特洛時，她的父親Anders Hansson Ekeblad38歲，母親Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne48歲。她於大約1560年與Erik Mattiasson Kagg在瑞典結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1629年在瑞典享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad于1538年出生在瑞典維亞斯特拉 格塔藍德斯特洛时，她的父亲Anders Hansson Ekeblad38岁，母亲Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne48岁。她于大约1560年与Erik Mattiasson Kagg在瑞典结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1629年在瑞典享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ekeblad
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the elements ek ‘oak’ +blad ‘leaf’.

nameMeanings.name: Beata
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Late Latin feminine form of Beatus ‘blessed’. The name was borne by an early Christian saint martyred in North Africa. Beata is widely used among Roman Catholics in Germany, Poland, and elsewhere; it is less common in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.
Peace of Stettin concluded. Denmark recognized independence of Sweden. Sweden gave up claim to Norway.
Treaty of Stolbovo ended Swedish occupation of Northern Russia.
1618-1648 Sweden fights in the Thirty Years' War.

en.lifeSummary: When Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad was born in 1538, in Strö, Västra Götaland, Sweden, her father, Anders Hansson Ekeblad, was 38 and her mother, Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne, was 48. She married Erik Mattiasson Kagg about 1560, in Sweden. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1629, in Sweden, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad est née en 1538, à Strö, Västra Götaland, Suède, son père, Anders Hansson Ekeblad, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Erik Mattiasson Kagg environ 1560, à Suède. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1629, à Suède, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad 1538 in Strö, Västra Götaland, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anders Hansson Ekeblad 38 und ihre Mutter Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne 48. Sie hat um 1560 in Schweden Erik Mattiasson Kagg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1629 im Alter von 91 Jahren in Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad è nata il nel 1538 nel Strö, Västra Götaland, Svezia, sua padre, Anders Hansson Ekeblad, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Erik Mattiasson Kagg circa 1560, nel Svezia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1629, nel Svezia, all'età di 91 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beata Andersdotter Ekebladが1538年にスウェーデンvaストラ グoタランドストルoで生まれた時，父Anders Hansson Ekebladは38歳，母Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåneは48歳であった。約1560年にスウェーデンでErik Mattiasson Kaggと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1629年にスウェーデンで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad(이)가 1538년 스웨덴 브a스트라 그o탤란드 스트o에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anders Hansson Ekeblad(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1560년 스웨덴에서 Erik Mattiasson Kagg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1629년 스웨덴에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad nasceu em 1538, em Strö, Västra Götaland, Suécia, seu pai, Anders Hansson Ekeblad, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Erik Mattiasson Kagg aproximadamente 1560, em Suécia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1629, em Suécia, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad родилась в 1538 г. в местности стрo, вaстра гoталанд, Швеция, её отцу по имени Anders Hansson Ekeblad было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Erik Mattiasson Kagg около 1560 г. в местности Швеция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1629 г. в местности Швеция в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Beata Andersdotter Ekeblad nació en 1538, en Strö, Västra Götaland, Suecia, su papá, Anders Hansson Ekeblad, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Agneta Nilsdotter Halvmåne, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Erik Mattiasson Kagg aproximadamente 1560, en Suecia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1629, en Suecia, a la edad de 91 años.
